query: Has Russia announced any extension of its gasoline (motor gasoline/benzine) export ban beyond July 31, 2026? Look for any cabinet resolution, decree, or official statement from late June 2026 or early July 2026 reported by TASS, Reuters, or government.ru. Also describe the recent status of Ukrainian drone strikes on Russian refineries and domestic gasoline shortages as of late June 2026, and historically how many days before each deadline past gasoline export ban extensions were formally announced.
answer:
## Summary

**Direct answer:** As of July 2, 2026, **no formal decree, cabinet resolution, or official statement extending Russia's gasoline export ban beyond July 31, 2026 has been reported** by TASS, Reuters, or government.ru. The ban's legal deadline remains **July 31, 2026** (set by the April 2, 2026 government decree). The government has only signaled intent — on June 23, 2026 it said it was "seriously considering" extending gasoline/diesel/jet fuel bans through end-2026, and Novak floated a possible multi-month diesel ban. Related July 1 measures (Tax Code amendments, EAEU zero-duty extension proposal, a separate June 26 price-cap decree through 2027) are distinct from a ban extension.

**Refinery strikes & shortages (late June 2026):** Russia is in its worst fuel crisis since 2009. ~25–30% of refining capacity is offline; gasoline output down ~15% y/y; Ukraine hit 8 of the 10 largest refineries in 2026 (Moscow's Kapotnya twice on June 16 & 18; Krasnodar and Yaroslavl on June 28). Rationing spread to 40+ regions; Crimea halted civilian sales; Putin publicly admitted the strikes were causing shortages (June 28–30).

**Historical extension timing:** Extensions are typically formalized very close to the deadline. The Dec 31, 2025 → Feb 28, 2026 extension was announced only **~4 days prior** (Dec 27, 2025); the end-2025 extension was announced Sept 30, 2025. Novak generally signals intent 1–5 weeks ahead, but the binding cabinet decree lands within roughly the last week before the deadline.

Full structured findings (key facts, sources with access dates, and quantitative data points) have been submitted via the StructuredOutput tool.
